intro: Refuel cars, manage your store, and grow your roadside empire.
description:
Step into the shoes of a station manager and take over an abandoned roadside gas station. From rusty pumps and empty shelves to a bustling hub of activity, every decision is yours. Refuel cars, clean vehicles, manage the store, and maintain the area — success depends on your skill, speed, and strategy. Experience the challenge of running a full-service station, where every role matters and every customer counts.

Key Features:
• Refuel & Serve: Keep fuel flowing and customers happy.
• Store Management: Stock shelves, sell goods, and attract more visitors.
• Car Wash & Maintenance: Clean vehicles and repair damaged equipment.
• Supply & Upgrades: Manage deliveries, monitor inventory, and improve your station.
• Hands-On Roles: Play as cashier, mechanic, cleaner, or take full control as manager.

Transform a forgotten stop into a thriving roadside empire. Gas Station Simulator is more than a game — it’s your chance to master every detail, grow your business, and build the ultimate gas station experience. Are you ready to take the wheel?
